title: Directorate of Promotion and Public Relations - Our Services
content:
Directorate of Promotion and Public Relations - Our Services

To produce solutions to all questions and problems of our candidate students,

Representing Istanbul Esenyurt University in domestic fairs and event activities,

Organizing events for prospective students about the promotion of Istanbul Esenyurt University,

To provide free preference consultancy services through our expert guidance teachers during university preference periods,

To prepare materials such as catalogues, magazines, brochures and promotional videos used in the promotion of Istanbul Esenyurt University for fairs and secondary education institutions,

Banners, brochures, catalogs, etc. To organize all the works transmitted until the distribution of promotional materials,

Ensuring that Istanbul Esenyurt University establishes and develops strong and reliable ties with the target audience groups, social stakeholders and the general public,

To ensure the management of communication, protocol, event management and organization processes with secondary education and university preparatory institutions,

To organize various activities in order to strengthen the relations of Istanbul Esenyurt University with high schools, educators, parents and students, and to accurately explain the opportunities and advantages it offers.

This content was updated on 02/09/2024.
